chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-2248 of 2025 Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) HEARING. 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1 and 2. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.08.2025 Mr. Shahid Ali, Advocate holds brief for Ghulam Asghar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Hyder Saleem, Addl. P.G. ************* Counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition and submits that he will approach learned trial court as SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh. The instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
